name: Baby Salmon Stuffed with Caviar III (Assembl
recipeIngredient: Salmon, baby, filet (5 oz each), head, tail, and skin on
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salmon mousse and caviar.
2. Wash and season the baby salmon with salt and pepper.
3. Pipe the salmon mousse into the inside of the salmon fillet.
4. Add a line of caviar inside the salmon, then sprinkle with chives.
5. Close the fish by placing it in a sauté pan (belly down).
6. Heat white wine in the pan and add shallot puree and bay leaf.
7. Bake the fish in a 350-400°F oven for 20 minutes until cooked.
8. Remove from the pan, remove the skin, and reserve warm.
9. Strain juices into a saucepan containing a red wine butter sauce.
10. For assembly, place the baby salmon on a serving dish.
11. Spoon some of the salmon-flavored red wine sauce over half the fish.
12. Spoon the wine butter sauce (flavored with poaching liquid) over the other half.
13. Garnish with cucumber, tomato, chives, eggs, and crayfish tails.
Note: These recipes should be prepared ahead of time.
